<meta name="description" content="Rare earth elements like lanthanum, neodymium, and dysprosium are used to build the electric motor in your car, the LED lights in your house, and the MRI" />
<link rel="canonical" href="https://pme.uchicago.edu/news-events/news/cleaner-route-purifying-rare-earth-elements" />
<meta property="og:site_name" content="UChicago PME" />
<meta property="og:url" content="https://pme.uchicago.edu/news-events/news/cleaner-route-purifying-rare-earth-elements" />
<meta property="og:title" content="A cleaner route to purifying rare earth elements" />
<meta property="og:description" content="Rare earth elements like lanthanum, neodymium, and dysprosium are used to build the electric motor in your car, the LED lights in your house, and the MRI machine at your doctor’s office." />
<meta property="og:image:url" content="https://pme.uchicago.edu/sites/default/files/2026-07/Chong_Liu_057.jpg" />
<meta property="og:image:alt" content="Chong Liu and Siqi" />

<meta name="twitter:description" content="Rare earth elements like lanthanum, neodymium, and dysprosium are used to build the electric motor in your car, the LED lights in your house, and the MRI machine at your doctor’s office." />
<meta name="twitter:title" content="A cleaner route to purifying rare earth elements" />
<meta name="twitter:image:alt" content="Chong Liu and Siqi" />
